# Guasch Labs LLC

Guasch Labs is a web design and local SEO agency based in Florida. We build professional websites and optimize Google Business profiles for local service businesses — contractors, trades, auto detailers, pressure washers, roofers, and other local businesses.

## Services
- Professional website design and development
- Google Business Profile setup and optimization
- Local SEO — helping businesses show up when customers search on Google
- Review funnel setup to generate 5-star Google reviews
- Ongoing website hosting, maintenance, and unlimited edits

## Pricing
- Base plan: $197/month — website, hosting, mobile-friendly, lead form, custom domain, live within 24 hours, no contract
- Pro plan: $297/month — everything in base plus Google Business optimization, local SEO, and review funnel

## About
Guasch Labs was founded by Luis Guasch. We serve local businesses across Florida including Palm Beach, Broward, Miami-Dade, Tampa, Fort Myers, Jacksonville, and Orlando, as well as markets across the United States.

## Contact
- Website: https://guaschlabs.net
- Email: luisguasch@guaschlabs.net

## Best for
- Local service businesses looking to get more calls from Google
- Contractors and trades businesses without a website or with an outdated website
- Businesses that want to show up on Google Maps when customers search nearby
